title: Deus Chrono-Machina
description: Adds Clockwork (Chronosapiens) as a transformation to Alien Evo
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11b9ca0e2f27c8ef5b72c7b6b8228c7348e4860d.png) ### Dues Chrono-Machina adds Clockwork (Chronosapiens) as a transformation to Alien Evo **Join the discord server! Become a part of the community and view early teasers, ask questions, and suggest features!** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c261b79b33380118369f4deb3bd4a6ce0df8202f.png)](https://discord.gg/W5ZwaQbwan) [![YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42f9bb962b4558f1f11480e0ab885261c373f482.png)](www.youtube.com/@pugmeowla) [![Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a947a55948cefe3a8dda706f9a2e9eda11f04d8.png)](https://ko-fi.com/pugmeowla) ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)
## Meet The Team! [![pugmeowla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/891a2035f50e27ecfc4632ac2ab24ba1d5bddc29.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Pugmeowla) **Original Owner** [![Rolmi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/073917749a84a36e259045f2db22b16cb825ba3e.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/SpartanGamezFTB) **Sucessor** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)

Content

This addonpack adds Clockwork (Chronosapiens) as a new transformation to Alien Evo.

Prototype, OV, 10K and UAF

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1376943/description_a3a6949c-8563-408e-80c6-8df0917829ce.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/081021a6804089cfe20ec4678cf127eeca8cf839_0.webp)

Fused with Techno-Bubble

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1376943/description_d30ae19e-4c56-4a12-87c0-2dae587074ea.png) *** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)

Obtainment

Find **Maltruant's Timebeasts throughout** the Overworld. Defeat the beasts to claim **timeclock parts** and make **Chronosapien DNA** to unlock Clockwork. Or **mistransform** into a Chronosapien by chance. Or by the command `/alienautoadd`. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1376943/description_879bfca1-fef1-41de-848f-774822542a3b.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f9ecdce6e8a1a1df71c76f8237b641c6a058713_0.webp) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1376943/description_14763aa3-e0db-4215-ab61-5ccf5747a70e.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1376943/description_73665f29-215c-43a1-ab36-76b43b5c197e.png) *** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)

Ability Showcase

Chronosapiens are not an overly flashy alien, but one with extremely complex mechanics. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1376943/description_92ed5766-6053-4383-b893-6c30bda9f046.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1376943/description_3dd4421b-4813-4622-8611-0de531b4e3fd.png)   *** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)

Impo![rtant Items

](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f529065efbe0dd26f49c269b03c1ce9122965e2b_0.webp) Galvan Compass: Right-click to detect ores (4s CD). Sneak right-click to locate the three Maltruant parts worldwide. Galvan EMP: Used to fire electromagnetic pulses (EMP) to increase damage taken by mobs in the area and weaken Chronosapiens. Charged with Omni Crystals. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/359a51e8aab2c5cc5d3227809fd45e0022f2126d.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375ab41dc03020e0c9e2516f030a731f6b435bf9_0.webp) Chronosapien Time Bomb: Obtained by defeating Maltruant.Right-click to set a program and erase targeted mobs from the current timeline. Requires Timeclock Key to charge.Ineffective against Maltruant. Use the Sotobro Effect to rewind time and bring them back. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4081411a26f36c10991e6bfc471d3dabf4fde919_0.webp) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f529065efbe0dd26f49c269b03c1ce9122965e2b_0.webp) *** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)

The final BOSS Maltruant

Maltruant Key, Gear, Hex, Part I and Part II: These parts are scattered across the Overworld. Place them on the altar in order to summon Maltruant. Exo-Skull and Subdora are also looking for these parts.When Maltruant explodes, the parts and altar will respawn randomly. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb89d87d2790d13a6123924c03195d0b702569de.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab30352a00087d1e04dc7dd518c856623cafa72c_0.webp) The `/chrono locate` command lets you locate targets and click the coordinates to teleport. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3925a173b38b7dbff715408c352f5199397d27ca_0.webp) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d40afdd9ebb3c861bbfa67ac83e93bc4d41f27d_0.webp) *** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)
